name: PlatinumS
short_description: PlatinumS is a roguelite top-down arena shooter that brings the ultimate hero's party-building experience to life, empowering heroes to conquer dungeons. Players have the option to select from a range of items and buffs to craft their own distinctive builds.
detailed_description:
PlatinumS is a roguelite top-down arena shooter that brings the ultimate hero's party-building experience to life, empowering heroes to conquer dungeons. Players have the option to select from a range of items and buffs to craft their own distinctive builds.

Gameplay

  • Party-based movement in a retro RPG style
  • Automatically shooting when close to enemy
  • Defeat enemies and collect dropped coins to purchase items and heroes in the store
  • Each lord can lead up to five heroes
  • Gain experience points to upgrade your heroes

Features

  • Each session with waves lasting 15 minutes
  • There are currently four playable stages
  • Four optional lords
  • 15+ different style heroes
  • 30+ optional items to upgrade
  • 70+ equipments in shop

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean
